mapper.sql: id, name, row_count, col_count, introduction, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM studio WHERE status = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR introduction LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO studio (name, row_count, col_count, introduction, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{rowCount}, #{colCount}, #{introduction}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE studio SET name = #{name}, row_count = #{rowCount}, col_count = #{colCount}, introduction = #{introduction} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE studio SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
